---
title: "Data Prep for: NWS Spread in Mexico"
output: 
  html_document: default
  processed_data: default
---


 
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE
)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)
#library(ggmap)
library(tidygeocoder)
library(sf)
library(stringi)
```

# Load data on NWS detections in Mexico
```{r load data}
nws_detections <- read_xlsx(
    here("data", "raw", "NWS cases in Mexico.xlsx"),
    sheet = "Cuadro resumen"
) 
glimpse(nws_detections)
View(head(nws_detections))
# the data switches from mm/dd/yyyy to dd/mm/yyyy at row 6003, so we need to fix that
nws_detections <- nws_detections %>%
    mutate(date = if_else(row_number() < 6003, as.Date(date, format = "%m/%d/%Y"), as.Date(date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")))

# replace "N/A" with NA
nws_detections <- nws_detections %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.character), ~na_if(., "N/A")))

# take state and municipality to lower case - this helps with the articles 'de/del/la/las'
nws_detections <- nws_detections |>
    rename(host_species = `Host Species`) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.character), tolower))

#shorten to villa de tututepec, oaxaca to match the detections data, which has it as villa de tututepec, oaxaca
print(nws_detections |> filter(str_detect(Municipality, "villa de tututepec")) |> distinct(Municipality))
nws_detections <- nws_detections |> mutate(Municipality = if_else(str_detect(Municipality, "villa de tututepec"), "villa de tututepec", Municipality))
print(nws_detections |> filter(str_detect(Municipality, "villa de tututepec")) |> distinct(Municipality))

# save to processed data folder
write_csv(nws_detections, here("data", "processed", "nws_detections.csv"))
saveRDS(nws_detections, here("data", "processed", "nws_detections.rds"))
```

## output some summary stats about the detections
```{r summary stats}
range(nws_detections$date)
#hosts
print(nws_detections |> count(host_species) |> arrange(desc(n)))
#states
print(nws_detections |> count(State) |> arrange(desc(n)))
#number origin/destination
print(nws_detections |> filter(is.na(Origin) & is.na(Destination)) |> count())
```

## Load Mexico georeference data
```{r load georeference data}
mexico_municip_geo <- sf::st_read(here("data", "raw", "mexico_municipalities_full.geojson"))

#take the state and municipality to lower case to match the detections data
mexico_municip_geo <- mexico_municip_geo %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.character), tolower))

head(mexico_municip_geo)
glimpse(mexico_municip_geo)

#Shorten veracruz to veracruz to match the detections data, which has it as veracruz
print(mexico_municip_geo |> filter(str_detect(NOMGEO, "veracruz")) |> distinct(NOMGEO))
mexico_municip_geo <- mexico_municip_geo |> mutate(NOMGEO = if_else(str_detect(NOMGEO, "veracruz"), "veracruz", NOMGEO))
print(mexico_municip_geo |> filter(str_detect(NOMGEO, "veracruz")) |> distinct(NOMGEO))

#Shorten to cintalapa, chiapas to match the detections data, which has it as cintalapa, chiapas
print(mexico_municip_geo |> filter(str_detect(NOMMUN, "cintalapa")) |> distinct(NOMMUN))
mexico_municip_geo <- mexico_municip_geo |> mutate(NOMMUN = if_else(str_detect(NOMMUN, "cintalapa"), "cintalapa", NOMMUN))
print(mexico_municip_geo |> filter(str_detect(NOMMUN, "cintalapa")) |> distinct(NOMMUN))

# save to processed data folder
sf::st_write(mexico_municip_geo,
            here("data", "processed", "mexico_municip_geo.geojson"),
            delete_dsn = TRUE)
saveRDS(mexico_municip_geo, here("data", "processed", "mexico_municip_geo.rds"))

mexico_municip_geo <- mexico_municip_geo |> rename(municipality_geometry = geometry)


## Load mexico state data
mexico_states_geo <- sf::st_read(here("data", "raw", "mexico_states_full.geojson"))

#take the state and municipality to lower case to match the detections data
mexico_states_geo <- mexico_states_geo %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.character), tolower))

#Shorten veracruz to veracruz to match the detections data, which has it as veracruz
print(mexico_states_geo |> filter(str_detect(NOMGEO, "veracruz")) |> distinct(NOMGEO))
mexico_states_geo <- mexico_states_geo |> mutate(NOMGEO = if_else(str_detect(NOMGEO, "veracruz"), "veracruz", NOMGEO))
print(mexico_states_geo |> filter(str_detect(NOMGEO, "veracruz")) |> distinct(NOMGEO))


head(mexico_states_geo)
glimpse(mexico_states_geo)


# save to processed data folder
sf::st_write(mexico_states_geo, here("data", "processed", "mexico_states_geo.geojson"), delete_dsn = TRUE)
saveRDS(mexico_states_geo, here("data", "processed", "mexico_states_geo.rds"))

mexico_states_geo <- mexico_states_geo |> rename(state_geometry = geometry)

mexico_states_geo <- mexico_states_geo |> dplyr::select(CVEGEO, state_geometry)

# SF doesn't like when there are 2 geometries, because it donesn't know which is active.
# Dropping geometry from states will allow a join but that drops the geometry entirely.
# Changing to a tibble preserverse the states_geometry column as it was but drops it as an sfc class, which allows left_join to work well.
mexico_states_lookup <- tibble::tibble(
    mexico_states_geo
)

#bind them, rename as necessary, and make active.
mexico_geo <- mexico_municip_geo %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
        mexico_states_lookup,
        by = c("CVE_ENT" = "CVEGEO")
    ) %>%
    sf::st_as_sf(sf_column_name = "municipality_geometry") %>%
    sf::st_make_valid()

# In the future use st_set_geometry("state_geometry") to get the state geometry and st_set_geometry("municipality_geometry") to get the municipality geometry, and then can do spatial operations with those geometries as needed.

# save to processed data folder
sf::st_write(mexico_geo, here("data", "processed", "mexico_geo.geojson"), delete_dsn = TRUE)
saveRDS(mexico_geo, here("data", "processed", "mexico_geo.rds"))
```


## Create singular approach for matching the georeference data to the detections data
```{r create singular approach for matching georeference data}
# create a function that takes in the detections data and the georeference data and returns the detections data with the georeference data joined on
match_georeference <- function(detections, georeference) {
    detections_cols <- colnames(detections)

    detections_geo <- detections %>%
        dplyr::left_join(georeference, by = c("State" = "NOMGEO", "Municipality" = "NOMMUN"))

    unknown_locations <- detections_geo |>
        dplyr::filter(is.na(CVEGEO)) |>
        dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(detections_cols)) |>
        dplyr::mutate(
            Municipality_plain = stri_trans_general(Municipality, "Latin-ASCII"),
            State_plain = stri_trans_general(State, "Latin-ASCII")
        )

    georeference_plain <- georeference %>%
        dplyr::mutate(
            NOMMUN_plain = stri_trans_general(NOMMUN, "Latin-ASCII"),
            NOMGEO_plain = stri_trans_general(NOMGEO, "Latin-ASCII")
        )

    detections_geo_plain <- unknown_locations |>
        dplyr::left_join(
            georeference_plain,
            by = c("State_plain" = "NOMGEO_plain", "Municipality_plain" = "NOMMUN_plain")
        )

    cat("Unmatched locations after plain text join:\n")
    print(
        detections_geo_plain |>
            dplyr::group_by(State, Municipality) |>
            dplyr::filter(is.na(CVEGEO)) |>
            dplyr::count() |>
            dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n))
    )

    detections_geo_plain <- detections_geo_plain |>
        dplyr::filter(!is.na(CVEGEO)) |>
        dplyr::select(-dplyr::any_of(c("Municipality_plain", "State_plain")))

    dplyr::bind_rows(
        detections_geo |> dplyr::filter(!is.na(CVEGEO)),
        detections_geo_plain
    )
}

detections_geo_final <- match_georeference(nws_detections, mexico_geo)

# save matched detections to processed data folder
sf::st_write(
    detections_geo_final,
    here("data", "processed", "nws_detections_geo.geojson"),
    delete_dsn = TRUE
)
saveRDS(detections_geo_final, here("data", "processed", "nws_detections_geo.rds"))

```


## Separate out the origin and destination data for the detections
```{r separate origin and destination data}
normalize_place_name <- function(x) {
    x %>%
        stri_trans_general("Latin-ASCII") %>%
        stringr::str_replace_all("\\([^)]*\\)", " ") %>%
        stringr::str_replace_all(":.*$", " ") %>%
        stringr::str_replace_all("[^[:alnum:], ]", " ") %>%
        stringr::str_squish()
}

build_lookup_tables <- function(georeference) {
    georeference_points <- georeference %>%
        sf::st_transform(3857) %>%
        sf::st_point_on_surface() %>%
        sf::st_transform(4326)

    point_coords <- sf::st_coordinates(georeference_points)

    municipality_lookup <- georeference_points %>%
        dplyr::mutate(
            municipality_plain = normalize_place_name(NOMMUN),
            state_plain = normalize_place_name(NOMGEO),
            lon = point_coords[, 1],
            lat = point_coords[, 2]
        ) %>%
        sf::st_drop_geometry() %>%
        dplyr::select(CVEGEO, NOMGEO, NOMMUN, state_plain, municipality_plain, lon, lat)

    state_lookup <- municipality_lookup %>%
        dplyr::distinct(NOMGEO, state_plain)

    list(
        state_lookup = state_lookup,
        municipality_lookup = municipality_lookup
    )
}

find_state_match <- function(state_text, raw_text, state_lookup) {
    state_candidates <- character(0)

    if (!is.na(state_text) && nzchar(state_text)) {
        state_candidates <- state_lookup$state_plain[state_lookup$state_plain == state_text]
        if (length(state_candidates) == 0) {
            state_candidates <- state_lookup$state_plain[
                stringr::str_detect(state_lookup$state_plain, stringr::fixed(state_text)) |
                    stringr::str_detect(state_text, stringr::fixed(state_lookup$state_plain))
            ]
        }
    }

    if (length(state_candidates) == 0 && !is.na(raw_text) && nzchar(raw_text)) {
        state_candidates <- state_lookup$state_plain[
            stringr::str_detect(raw_text, stringr::fixed(state_lookup$state_plain))
        ]
    }

    if (length(state_candidates) == 0) {
        return(NA_character_)
    }

    state_candidates[which.max(nchar(state_candidates))]
}

find_municipality_match <- function(muni_text, raw_text, state_match, municipality_lookup) {
    candidates <- municipality_lookup

    if (!is.na(state_match)) {
        candidates <- candidates[candidates$state_plain == state_match, , drop = FALSE]
    }

    if (nrow(candidates) == 0) {
        return(NULL)
    }

    query <- muni_text
    if (is.na(query) || !nzchar(query)) {
        query <- raw_text
    }

    if (is.na(query) || !nzchar(query)) {
        return(NULL)
    }

    if (!is.na(state_match) && nzchar(state_match)) {
        query <- stringr::str_replace_all(query, stringr::fixed(state_match), " ")
        query <- stringr::str_squish(query)
    }

    if (!nzchar(query)) {
        return(NULL)
    }

    exact <- candidates[candidates$municipality_plain == query, , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(exact) > 0) {
        return(exact[1, , drop = FALSE])
    }

    contains <- candidates[
        stringr::str_detect(candidates$municipality_plain, stringr::fixed(query)) |
            stringr::str_detect(query, stringr::fixed(candidates$municipality_plain)),
        ,
        drop = FALSE
    ]

    if (nrow(contains) == 0) {
        return(NULL)
    }

    contains[which.max(nchar(contains$municipality_plain)), , drop = FALSE]
}

match_transport_locations <- function(data, state_lookup, municipality_lookup, municipality_col, state_col, raw_col, prefix) {
    match_rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(data)), function(row_id) {
        raw_value <- normalize_place_name(data[[raw_col]][row_id])
        municipality_value <- data[[municipality_col]][row_id]
        state_value <- data[[state_col]][row_id]

        municipality_plain <- normalize_place_name(municipality_value)
        state_plain <- normalize_place_name(state_value)

        result <- list(row_id = row_id)
        result[[paste0(prefix, "_matched_state")]] <- NA_character_
        result[[paste0(prefix, "_matched_municipality")]] <- NA_character_
        result[[paste0(prefix, "_cvegeo")]] <- NA_character_
        result[[paste0(prefix, "_lon")]] <- NA_real_
        result[[paste0(prefix, "_lat")]] <- NA_real_
        result[[paste0(prefix, "_match_method")]] <- NA_character_

        state_match <- find_state_match(state_plain, raw_value, state_lookup)
        municipality_match <- find_municipality_match(municipality_plain, raw_value, state_match, municipality_lookup)

        if (is.null(municipality_match)) {
            return(tibble::as_tibble(result))
        }

        result[[paste0(prefix, "_matched_state")]] <- municipality_match$NOMGEO[[1]]
        result[[paste0(prefix, "_matched_municipality")]] <- municipality_match$NOMMUN[[1]]
        result[[paste0(prefix, "_cvegeo")]] <- municipality_match$CVEGEO[[1]]
        result[[paste0(prefix, "_lon")]] <- municipality_match$lon[[1]]
        result[[paste0(prefix, "_lat")]] <- municipality_match$lat[[1]]
        result[[paste0(prefix, "_match_method")]] <- "lookup_contains"

        tibble::as_tibble(result)
    })

    matches <- dplyr::bind_rows(match_rows)

    data %>%
        dplyr::mutate(row_id = dplyr::row_number()) %>%
        dplyr::left_join(matches, by = "row_id") %>%
        dplyr::select(-row_id)
}

# Separate out the origin and destination data for the detections
detections_transport <- nws_detections %>%
    dplyr::filter(
        !is.na(Origin),
        !is.na(Destination),
        Origin != "na",
        Destination != "na"
    )

# Convert Origin to a origin_state, origin_municipality column, and Destination to a destination_state or destination_municipality column
# The Origin and Destination are "municipality, state" but sometimes missing a comma, and sometimes missing a space after the comma, so we need to clean that up first
detections_transport <- detections_transport %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
        orig = Origin,
        dest = Destination,
        Origin = str_replace_all(Origin, "\\s*,\\s*", ", "),
        Origin = str_squish(Origin),
        Destination = str_replace_all(Destination, "\\s*,\\s*", ", "),
        Destination = str_squish(Destination)
    )

detections_transport <- detections_transport %>%
    tidyr::separate(Origin, into = c("origin_municipality", "origin_state"), sep = ", ", fill = "right", extra = "merge") %>%
    tidyr::separate(Destination, into = c("destination_municipality", "destination_state"), sep = ", ", fill = "right", extra = "merge")

lookup_tables <- build_lookup_tables(mexico_municip_geo)
state_lookup <- lookup_tables$state_lookup
municipality_lookup <- lookup_tables$municipality_lookup

detections_transport <- detections_transport %>%
    match_transport_locations(
        state_lookup = state_lookup,
        municipality_lookup = municipality_lookup,
        municipality_col = "origin_municipality",
        state_col = "origin_state",
        raw_col = "orig",
        prefix = "origin"
    ) %>%
    match_transport_locations(
        state_lookup = state_lookup,
        municipality_lookup = municipality_lookup,
        municipality_col = "destination_municipality",
        state_col = "destination_state",
        raw_col = "dest",
        prefix = "destination"
    )

View(detections_transport)

cat("Unmatched origin locations after state-constrained fuzzy matching:\n")
print(
    detections_transport %>%
        dplyr::filter(is.na(origin_lon) | is.na(origin_lat)) %>%
        dplyr::count(origin_state, origin_municipality, sort = TRUE)
)

cat("Unmatched destination locations after state-constrained fuzzy matching:\n")
print(
    detections_transport %>%
        dplyr::filter(is.na(destination_lon) | is.na(destination_lat)) %>%
        dplyr::count(destination_state, destination_municipality, sort = TRUE)
)


detections_transport <- detections_transport |>
    dplyr::filter(!(is.na(origin_cvegeo) | is.na(destination_cvegeo)))

write.csv(detections_transport, here("data", "processed", "nws_detections_transport.csv"))
saveRDS(detections_transport, here("data", "processed", "nws_detections_transport.rds"))
sf::st_write(
    detections_transport,
    here("data", "processed", "nws_detections_transport.geojson"),
    delete_dsn = TRUE
)
```
